title: Teacher guilty of rape
bodyText: [{"type":"paragraph","text":"PLETTENBERG BAY  NEWS - A Murray High School teacher has been found guilty of rape in the Plettenberg Bay Regional Court.","html":"PLETTENBERG BAY NEWS - A Murray High School teacher has been found guilty of rape in the Plettenberg Bay Regional Court."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Thabile Manetsa pleaded not guilty to the charge of raping the friend of his girlfriend.","html":"Thabile Manetsa pleaded not guilty to the charge of raping the friend of his girlfriend."},{"type":"blockquote","text":"He was convicted by Magistrate Siyabonga Mazibuko on 17 October, after a lengthy trial."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"The rape happened at his home.","html":"The rape happened at his home."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Read more in tomorrow's edition of the Knysna-Plett Herald.","html":"Read more in tomorrow's edition of the Knysna-Plett Herald."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’","html":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’"}]
